name: one-button-done
description: Universal AI Agent Framework — any AI platform, any model, autonomous delivery of finished work. Read AGENTS.md to start.

interface.shortDescription: Universal AI autonomous delivery framework — any platform, any model
interface.longDescription: Any AI platform reads AGENTS.md and autonomously delivers finished work: plan, implement, test, and ship. Supports Claude, Codex, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini, Copilot, Roo Code, Aider, and any LLM that reads markdown.
defaultPrompt: Read AGENTS.md and autonomously deliver the requested work.
Inspect this project and autonomously implement the next improvement.
